_meta.format: Each entry under 'exceptions' is keyed by GHSA id. Each MUST include: severity at triage, justification, expiry (YYYY-MM-DD).
_meta.policy: Renew quarterly. Past-expiry entries are treated as new findings and fail the gate.

GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr.justification: esbuild 0.25.12 (transitive via vite 6.4.2, dev-only toolchain). Advisory targets esbuild's Deno-specific binary-download shim, which fetches the platform binary via NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY without integrity verification. This repo is npm/pnpm + Node only (no Deno anywhere in the toolchain), so esbuild resolves its binary through the standard @esbuild/* npm packages and the vulnerable Deno install path is never executed. No non-breaking upgrade exists: vite 6.x and 7.x both pin esbuild ^0.25.0 (cannot reach patched >=0.28.1); only a vite 8 major bump (cascading @vitejs/plugin-react 4.x->6.x) would move it. Time-boxed pending a vite release that bumps its esbuild range to ^0.28.
